members.label: plant
members.long_form_open_description: Medium-sized potted houseplant with multiple green drooping leaves, placed on the side table in the foreground; leaves show some browning/dry tips. Pot partially visible and positioned toward the front edge of the table.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: in front of and slightly left of the lamp on the side table
